---
title: "Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent society–a European perspective”"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent society–a European perspective”. *Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_overcoming_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This book review summarizes and critiques a volume on car dependence in Europe. It discusses the structural and cultural factors that sustain automobile-oriented lifestyles and explores strategies for modal shift."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design
**Year:** 2014

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This book review summarizes and critiques a volume on car dependence in Europe. It discusses the structural and cultural factors that sustain automobile-oriented lifestyles and explores strategies for modal shift.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Overcoming car dependence: Review of “The car dependent society–a European perspective”. *Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_overcoming_2014,
	title = {Overcoming car dependence: {Review} of “{The} car dependent society–a {European} perspective”},
	volume = {41},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	issn = {0265-8135},
	abstract = {This book review summarizes and critiques a volume on car dependence in Europe. It discusses the structural and cultural factors that sustain automobile-oriented lifestyles and explores strategies for modal shift.},
	number = {5},
	journal = {Environment and Planning B-Planning and Design},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2014},
	keywords = {Book review},
	pages = {948--949},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
